---
title: Médaillons de porc à la sauce crémeuse aux champignons et au porto

categories:
  - Porc
  - Français
  - Sauce
---

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-toolbar">

```

```{=html}
<script id="recipe-cart-data" type="application/json">{"id":"/recettes/repas/me-daillons-de-porc-champignons-porto.qmd","title":"Médaillons de porc à la sauce crémeuse aux champignons et au porto","url":"/recettes/repas/me-daillons-de-porc-champignons-porto.qmd","portions_base":3,"portions_target":3,"ingredients":[{"nom":"Champignons","uni":"g","qte":250,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"},{"nom":"Filet de porc","uni":"g","qte":500,"rangee":"Viandes et substituts"},{"nom":"Beurre","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Produits laitiers et oeufs"},{"nom":"Sel","uni":"au goût","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Médaillons de porc","uni":"g","qte":500,"rangee":"Viandes et substituts"},{"nom":"Sel","uni":"au goût","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Poivre","uni":"au goût","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Farine","uni":"tasse","qte":0.25,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Beurre","uni":"c. à soupe","qte":1,"rangee":"Produits laitiers et oeufs"},{"nom":"Huile végétale","uni":"c. à café","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Crème pure (35%)","uni":"ml","qte":250,"rangee":"Produits laitiers et oeufs"},{"nom":"Fond de volaille","uni":"ml","qte":125,"rangee":"Conserves et sauces"},{"nom":"Porto","uni":"ml","qte":60,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Sel","uni":"au goût","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Poivre","uni":"au goût","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Riz","uni":"portion","qte":1,"rangee":"Epicerie"},{"nom":"Aneth frais","uni":"branche","qte":1,"rangee":"Fruits et legumes"}]}</script>
<script src="/includes/recipe-cart.js"></script>
```

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-servings-control"><label for="servings-input" class="form-label mb-1">Ajuster les portions</label><div class="d-flex gap-2 align-items-center mb-2"><input id="servings-input" class="form-control form-control-sm" type="number" min="1" step="1" value="3" style="max-width: 110px;"><button id="servings-reset" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" type="button">Réinitialiser</button><span class="text-muted small">Base: 3</span></div><div class="recipe-measure-mode"><span class="form-label mb-1 d-block">Affichage des quantités</span><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Mode de mesure"><button id="measure-mode-volume" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="volume">Volume</button><button id="measure-mode-mass" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button" data-mode="mass">Masse</button></div><div class="recipe-measure-submodes mt-2"><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm" role="group" aria-label="Format volume"><button id="volume-unit-kitchen" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">Cuillères / tasse</button><button id="volume-unit-ml" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">mL</button></div><div class="btn-group btn-group-sm ms-2" role="group" aria-label="Format masse"><button id="mass-unit-g" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">g</button><button id="mass-unit-lbs" class="btn btn-outline-secondary" type="button">lbs</button></div></div><span class="text-muted small d-block mt-1">Les quantités converties sont affichées dans une couleur différente.</span></div></div>
```

## Valeurs nutritives

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-nutrition-block"><div class="recipe-nutrition-cards"><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Calories</span><strong>290 kcal</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Protéines</span><strong>38,4 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Glucides</span><strong>8 g</strong></div><div class="recipe-nutrition-card"><span>Lipides</span><strong>10,5 g</strong></div></div><details class="recipe-nutrition-details"><summary class="recipe-nutrition-toggle">Afficher le détail complet</summary><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Estimations basées sur les ingrédients saisis. Portions de base: 3.</p><p class="recipe-nutrition-meta">Sources nutrition (ingrédients calculés): cnf_2015: 4.</p><table class="recipe-nutrition-table table table-sm"><thead><tr><th>Nutriment</th><th>Par recette</th><th>Par portion</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><th scope="row">Calories</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="871.3375" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">871 kcal</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="871.3375" data-decimals="0" data-unit="kcal">290 kcal</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Protéines</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="115.2863" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">115,3 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="115.2863" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">38,4 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Lipides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="31.575" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">31,6 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="31.575" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">10,5 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Gras saturés</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="18.58561" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">18,6 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="18.58561" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">6,2 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Glucides</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="23.98394" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">24 g</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="23.98394" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">8 g</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sucres</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="0.196875" data-decimals="1" data-unit="g">0,2 g</td><td scope="row">Sodium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="273.3" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">273 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="273.3" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">91 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Potassium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1921.319" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">1921 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1921.319" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">640 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Calcium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="41.8375" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">42 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="41.8375" data-decimals="0" data-unit="mg">14 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Fer</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="7.658938" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">7,7 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="7.658938" data-base-total="10.84831" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">10,8 mg</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="10.84831" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">3,6 mg</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Sélénium</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="171.5913" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">171,6 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="171.5913" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">57,2 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine C</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="4.5" data-decimals="1" data-unit="mg">4,5 mg</td><td data-base-total="3.301" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">3,3 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="3.301" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">1,1 ug</td></tr><tr><th data-base-total="205.5312" data-decimals="0" data-unit="ug">69 ug</td></tr><tr><th scope="row">Vitamine D</th><td class="recipe-nutrition-total" data-base-total="1.45" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">1,5 ug</td><td class="recipe-nutrition-per-portion" data-base-total="1.45" data-decimals="1" data-unit="ug">0,5 ug</td></tr></tbody></table><details class="recipe-nutrition-missing"><summary>Ingrédients non comptabilisés (10)</summary><ul><li><code>Champignons</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Sel</code> (unite_non_calculable)</li><li><code>Médaillons de porc</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Poivre</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Huile végétale</code> (unite_non_supportee)</li><li><code>Crème pure (35%)</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Fond de volaille</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Porto</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Riz</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li><li><code>Aneth frais</code> (ingredient_non_mappe)</li></ul></details></details></div>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const key='recipe_reading_mode';
let wakeLock=null;
const apply=(on)=>{document.body.classList.toggle('reading-mode', on);};
const requestWake=async()=>{try{if('wakeLock' in navigator){wakeLock=await navigator.wakeLock.request('screen');}}catch(e){}};
const releaseWake=async()=>{try{if(wakeLock){await wakeLock.release(); wakeLock=null;}}catch(e){}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', ()=>{
const btn=document.getElementById('recipe-reading-mode');
const saved=localStorage.getItem(key)==='1'; apply(saved); if(saved) requestWake();
if(!btn) return;
const refresh=()=>{btn.classList.toggle('active', document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'));}; refresh();
btn.addEventListener('click', async()=>{const next=!document.body.classList.contains('reading-mode'); apply(next); localStorage.setItem(key, next?'1':'0'); refresh(); if(next){await requestWake();} else {await releaseWake();}});
});
})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<button id="reset-recipe-checks" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">↺ Réinitialiser les cases</button>
<span id="grocery-copy-feedback" class="text-muted small"></span>
</div>
```

### Préparation des ingrédients

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Champignons" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="250" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="250">250</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Champignons</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Filet de porc" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="500" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="500">500</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Filet de porc</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Beurre" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Médaillons de porc" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="500" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="500">500</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Médaillons de porc</span></span></label></li>

<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre</span></span></label></li>

<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Beurre" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile végétale" data-ingredient-unit="c. à café" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à café</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile végétale</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

### Préparation de la sauce crémeuse

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Crème pure (35%)" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="250" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="250">250</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Crème pure (35%)</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Fond de volaille" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="125" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="125">125</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Fond de volaille</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Porto" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="60" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="60">60</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Porto</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

### Dressage

```{=html}
<ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-grocery-list">
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Riz" data-ingredient-unit="portion" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">portion</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Riz</span></span></label></li>
<li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="grocery" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Aneth frais" data-ingredient-unit="branche" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">branche</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Aneth frais</span></span></label></li>
</ul>
```

## Équipements

### Préparation des ingrédients


### Cuisson des champignons

- Poêle

### Préparation et cuisson des médaillons de porc

- Poêle
- Four
- Plat allant au four

### Préparation de la sauce crémeuse

- Petite casserole
- Poêle
- Passoire fine

### Dressage


## Préparation

### Préparation des ingrédients

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Champignons" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="250" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="250">250</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Champignons</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Couper les champignons en fines tranches d'environ 0.5 mm.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Filet de porc" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="500" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="500">500</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Filet de porc</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Couper le filet de porc en médaillons d'environ 5 cm (2 pouces) d'épaisseur. Réserver les petites chutes si nécessaire.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

### Cuisson des champignons

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Beurre" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Dans une poêle à feu moyen-vif, faire fondre 1 cuillère à soupe de beurre. Ajouter les champignons tranchés.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Assaisonner les champignons avec du sel (pas de poivre pour l'instant). Faire sauter à feu vif.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>Laisser cuire jusqu'à ce que l'eau des champignons se soit évaporée et qu'ils commencent à dorer (environ 5-10 minutes). Remuer occasionnellement pour éviter qu'ils ne collent.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="600">⏱️ 10 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 4</span></label></div><p>Lorsque les champignons ont une belle couleur dorée, retirer du feu et réserver dans un récipient propre.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

### Préparation et cuisson des médaillons de porc

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Viandes et substituts" data-ingredient-name="Médaillons de porc" data-ingredient-unit="g" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="500" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="1" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="mass"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="500">500</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">g</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Médaillons de porc</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Assaisonner généreusement les médaillons de porc des deux côtés avec du sel et du poivre.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Farine" data-ingredient-unit="tasse" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="62.5" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="tasse" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="0.25">0.25</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">tasse</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Farine</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Rouler chaque médaillon dans la farine, puis taper pour enlever l'excès de farine.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Beurre" data-ingredient-unit="c. à soupe" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="15" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="c. à soupe" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à soupe</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Beurre</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Huile végétale" data-ingredient-unit="c. à café" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">c. à café</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Huile végétale</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>Dans la même poêle (après l'avoir nettoyée), à feu moyen-vif, faire fondre 1 cuillère à soupe de beurre et ajouter 1 cuillère à café d'huile végétale.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 4</span></label></div><p>Placer les médaillons de porc dans la poêle chaude. Cuire pendant 3 minutes de chaque côté.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="180">⏱️ 3 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 5</span></label></div><p>Pour les pièces plus épaisses, les faire tenir sur le côté et cuire 1 minute sur les bords pour assurer une cuisson uniforme.</p><div class="recipe-step-timers"><button type="button" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm recipe-timer-btn" data-seconds="60">⏱️ 1 min</button></div></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 6</span></label></div><p>Retirer les médaillons de la poêle et les réserver dans un four préchauffé à 150°C (250°F) pour les maintenir au chaud.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

### Préparation de la sauce crémeuse

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Produits laitiers et oeufs" data-ingredient-name="Crème pure (35%)" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="250" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="250">250</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Crème pure (35%)</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Dans une petite casserole à feu moyen, faire réduire la crème pure d'environ un quart. La crème est prête lorsqu'elle nappe le dos d'une cuillère et qu'un trait tracé avec le doigt reste visible. Éteindre le feu.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Conserves et sauces" data-ingredient-name="Fond de volaille" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="125" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="125">125</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Fond de volaille</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Dans une autre petite casserole, réchauffer doucement le fond de volaille à feu doux.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Porto" data-ingredient-unit="ml" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="60" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="1" data-default-mode="volume"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="60">60</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">ml</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Porto</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>Utiliser la poêle ayant servi à cuire le porc. Retirer l'excès de gras. Augmenter le feu. Déglacer la poêle avec le porto en raclant le fond pour décoller les sucs de cuisson.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 4</span></label></div><p>Ajouter un peu de la crème réduite dans la poêle, remuer pour bien incorporer.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 5</span></label></div><p>Ajouter le reste de la crème réduite et laisser cuire doucement en remuant pour bien incorporer tous les sucs de cuisson.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 6</span></label></div><p>Incorporer le fond de volaille chaud à la sauce. Laisser réduire la sauce jusqu'à obtenir la consistance désirée.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Sel" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Sel</span></span></label></li><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Poivre" data-ingredient-unit="au goût" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">au goût</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Poivre</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 7</span></label></div><p>Goûter la sauce et ajuster l'assaisonnement avec du sel et du poivre si nécessaire.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 8</span></label></div><p>Filtrer la sauce à travers une passoire fine dans un récipient propre pour obtenir une sauce lisse.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 9</span></label></div><p>Ajouter les champignons réservés à la sauce filtrée et laisser infuser quelques minutes à feu doux.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

### Dressage

```{=html}
<div class="recipe-prep-grid">
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Epicerie" data-ingredient-name="Riz" data-ingredient-unit="portion" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">portion</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Riz</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 1</span></label></div><p>Sur une assiette, disposer le riz (ou l'accompagnement de votre choix) et les médaillons de porc chauds.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><div class="text-muted small">Aucun ingrédient spécifique.</div></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 2</span></label></div><p>Napper généreusement les médaillons de porc avec la sauce crémeuse aux champignons.</p></div></article>
<article class="recipe-prep-step"><div class="recipe-prep-ingredients"><div class="recipe-prep-label">Ingrédients</div><ul class="recipe-ingredients recipe-step-ingredients"><li class="recipe-ingredient" data-list-kind="step" data-rangee="Fruits et legumes" data-ingredient-name="Aneth frais" data-ingredient-unit="branche" data-measure-enabled="0" data-base-mass-g="" data-base-volume-ml="" data-unit-mass="g" data-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-unit-mass="g" data-explicit-unit-volume="ml" data-explicit-mass="0" data-explicit-volume="0" data-default-mode="none"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-ingredient-check"><span class="ingredient-label"><span class="ingredient-qte" data-base="1">1</span> <span class="ingredient-uni">branche</span> <span class="ingredient-nom">Aneth frais</span></span></label></li></ul></div><div class="recipe-prep-instruction"><div class="recipe-prep-stepno"><label class="recipe-check-row"><input type="checkbox" class="recipe-check recipe-step-check"><span>Étape 3</span></label></div><p>(Facultatif) Garnir avec une branche d'aneth frais pour la présentation.</p></div></article>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){const input=document.getElementById('servings-input');const reset=document.getElementById('servings-reset');const btnVolume=document.getElementById('measure-mode-volume');const btnMass=document.getElementById('measure-mode-mass');const btnVolKitchen=document.getElementById('volume-unit-kitchen');const btnVolMl=document.getElementById('volume-unit-ml');const btnMassG=document.getElementById('mass-unit-g');const btnMassLbs=document.getElementById('mass-unit-lbs');const hasScaler=!!input;const base=3;const modeKey='recipe_measure_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const volumeUnitKey='recipe_volume_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;const massUnitKey='recipe_mass_unit_mode:'+window.location.pathname;let mode=(localStorage.getItem(modeKey)==='mass')?'mass':'volume';let volumeUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(volumeUnitKey)==='ml')?'ml':'kitchen';let massUnitMode=(localStorage.getItem(massUnitKey)==='lbs')?'lbs':'g';const format=(n)=>{const r=Math.round(n*100)/100; return (Math.abs(r-Math.round(r))<1e-9)?String(Math.round(r)):String(r).replace('.',',');};const normalize=(u)=>String(u||'').toLowerCase().normalize('NFD').replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g,'').replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,' ').trim();const massFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'g':1,'gramme':1,'grammes':1,'gram':1,'grams':1,'kg':1000,'kilogramme':1000,'kilogrammes':1000,'lb':453.59237,'lbs':453.59237,'oz':28.34952,'once':28.34952,'onces':28.34952}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const volumeFactor=(unit)=>{const u=normalize(unit); const m={'ml':1,'millilitre':1,'millilitres':1,'l':1000,'litre':1000,'litres':1000,'t':250,'tasse':250,'tasses':250,'c a soupe':15,'cuillere a soupe':15,'cuilleres a soupe':15,'c a table':15,'c s':15,'c.s.':15,'c a the':5,'cuillere a the':5,'cuilleres a the':5,'c t':5,'c.t.':5}; return Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(m,u)?m[u]:NaN;};const isKitchenUnit=(u)=>{const n=normalize(u); return n==='tasse'||n==='t'||n==='c a soupe'||n==='cuillere a soupe'||n==='cuilleres a soupe'||n==='c a table'||n==='c s'||n==='c.s.'||n==='c a the'||n==='cuillere a the'||n==='cuilleres a the'||n==='c t'||n==='c.t.';};const chooseKitchenUnit=(volumeMl,explicit)=>{if(isKitchenUnit(explicit)) return explicit; if(!Number.isFinite(volumeMl)) return 'c. à thé'; if(volumeMl>=125) return 'tasse'; if(volumeMl>=7.5) return 'c. à soupe'; return 'c. à thé';};const setDerived=(label,qNode,uNode,isDerived)=>{if(qNode) qNode.classList.toggle('ingredient-approx',!!isDerived);};const updateIngredientForMode=(li,ratio)=>{const qNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-qte'); const uNode=li.querySelector('.ingredient-uni'); const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); if(!qNode||!label) return false; const baseMass=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseMassG||''); const baseVolume=parseFloat(li.dataset.baseVolumeMl||''); const explicitMass=li.dataset.explicitMass==='1'; const explicitVolume=li.dataset.explicitVolume==='1'; const explicitUnitMass=li.dataset.explicitUnitMass||'g'; const explicitUnitVolume=li.dataset.explicitUnitVolume||'ml'; let qty=NaN; let unit=''; let derived=false; if(mode==='mass'&&Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?'lbs':'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!(explicitMass&&normalize(explicitUnitMass)===normalize(unit));} else if(mode==='volume'&&Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!(explicitVolume&&normalize(explicitUnitVolume)===normalize(unit));} else if(Number.isFinite(baseVolume)){unit=(volumeUnitMode==='ml')?'ml':chooseKitchenUnit(baseVolume*ratio,explicitUnitVolume); const f=volumeFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseVolume*ratio)/f:(baseVolume*ratio); derived=!explicitVolume;} else if(Number.isFinite(baseMass)){unit=(massUnitMode==='lbs')?'lbs':'g'; const f=massFactor(unit); qty=Number.isFinite(f)&&f>0?(baseMass*ratio)/f:baseMass*ratio; derived=!explicitMass;} else {li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated'); return false;} qNode.textContent=format(qty); if(uNode){uNode.textContent=unit;} li.setAttribute('data-ingredient-unit', unit); li.setAttribute('data-live-updated','1'); setDerived(label,qNode,uNode,derived); return true;};const applyModeButtons=()=>{if(btnVolume) btnVolume.classList.toggle('active', mode==='volume'); if(btnMass) btnMass.classList.toggle('active', mode==='mass'); if(btnVolKitchen) btnVolKitchen.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='kitchen'); if(btnVolMl) btnVolMl.classList.toggle('active', volumeUnitMode==='ml'); if(btnMassG) btnMassG.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='g'); if(btnMassLbs) btnMassLbs.classList.toggle('active', massUnitMode==='lbs');};const update=()=>{const current=hasScaler?parseFloat(input.value):base;const ratio=(hasScaler&&Number.isFinite(current)&&current>0)?(current/base):1;document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-ingredient').forEach((li)=>{if(!updateIngredientForMode(li,ratio)){li.removeAttribute('data-live-updated');}});document.querySelectorAll('.ingredient-qte[data-base]').forEach((el)=>{if(el.closest('.recipe-ingredient[data-live-updated="1"]')) return;const b=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base'));if(Number.isFinite(b)){el.textContent=format(b*ratio);} });document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-total[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal*ratio;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-nutrition-per-portion[data-base-total]').forEach((el)=>{const baseTotal=parseFloat(el.getAttribute('data-base-total'));const unit=el.getAttribute('data-unit')||'';const dec=parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-decimals')||'1',10);if(Number.isFinite(baseTotal)){const v=baseTotal/base;let t=(Math.round(v*Math.pow(10,dec))/Math.pow(10,dec)).toFixed(Math.max(0,dec));if(dec>0){t=t.replace(/\.0+$/,'').replace(/(\.[0-9]*?)0+$/,'$1');}t=t.replace('.',',');el.textContent=t+' '+unit;}});};if(input){input.addEventListener('input', update);} if(reset&&input){reset.addEventListener('click', ()=>{input.value=String(base); update();});}if(btnVolume){btnVolume.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='volume'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'volume'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMass){btnMass.addEventListener('click', ()=>{mode='mass'; localStorage.setItem(modeKey,'mass'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolKitchen){btnVolKitchen.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='kitchen'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'kitchen'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnVolMl){btnVolMl.addEventListener('click', ()=>{volumeUnitMode='ml'; localStorage.setItem(volumeUnitKey,'ml'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassG){btnMassG.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='g'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'g'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}if(btnMassLbs){btnMassLbs.addEventListener('click', ()=>{massUnitMode='lbs'; localStorage.setItem(massUnitKey,'lbs'); applyModeButtons(); update();});}applyModeButtons();update();})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<div id="recipe-timer-dock" class="recipe-timer-dock d-none"><strong>Minuteur</strong> <span id="recipe-timer-label"></span> <span id="recipe-timer-remaining"></span> <button id="recipe-timer-stop" class="btn btn-sm btn-outline-light" type="button">Arrêter</button></div>
<script>(function(){
let timer=null, target=0, audioCtx=null, alarmInterval=null, alarmTimeout=null;
const pad=(n)=>String(n).padStart(2,'0');
const fmt=(s)=>{const h=Math.floor(s/3600), m=Math.floor((s%3600)/60), sec=s%60; return h>0?`${h}:${pad(m)}:${pad(sec)}`:`${m}:${pad(sec)}`;};
const ensureAudio=async()=>{const Ctx=window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext; if(!Ctx) return null; if(!audioCtx) audioCtx=new Ctx(); if(audioCtx.state==='suspended'){try{await audioCtx.resume();}catch(e){}} return audioCtx;};
const stopAlarm=()=>{if(alarmInterval){clearInterval(alarmInterval); alarmInterval=null;} if(alarmTimeout){clearTimeout(alarmTimeout); alarmTimeout=null;}};
const playBeep=(ctx,freq)=>{const t=ctx.currentTime+0.01; const osc=ctx.createOscillator(); const gain=ctx.createGain(); osc.type='sawtooth'; osc.frequency.value=freq; gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001,t); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.42,t+0.015); gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,t+0.19); osc.connect(gain); gain.connect(ctx.destination); osc.start(t); osc.stop(t+0.2);};
const startAlarm=async()=>{const ctx=await ensureAudio(); if(!ctx) return; stopAlarm(); const notes=[1760,1480,2093,1760,2349,1760]; let i=0; const ring=()=>{playBeep(ctx,notes[i%notes.length]); i+=1;}; ring(); alarmInterval=setInterval(ring,250); alarmTimeout=setTimeout(stopAlarm,15000);};
const dock=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-dock'); const rem=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-remaining'); const lab=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-label'); const stop=document.getElementById('recipe-timer-stop');
const hide=()=>{if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} stopAlarm(); if(dock) dock.classList.add('d-none');};
document.addEventListener('click',async(e)=>{const b=e.target.closest('.recipe-timer-btn'); if(!b) return; const secs=parseInt(b.dataset.seconds||'0',10); if(!secs||secs<1) return; await ensureAudio(); stopAlarm(); if(timer) clearInterval(timer); target=Date.now()+secs*1000; if(lab) lab.textContent=b.textContent.replace('⏱️','').trim(); if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); timer=setInterval(()=>{const left=Math.max(0, Math.round((target-Date.now())/1000)); if(rem) rem.textContent=fmt(left); if(left<=0){if(timer){clearInterval(timer); timer=null;} if(rem) rem.textContent='Terminé!'; if(dock) dock.classList.remove('d-none'); startAlarm();}},250);});
if(stop) stop.addEventListener('click', hide);
})();</script>
```

```{=html}
<script>(function(){
const pageKey='recipe_check_state:'+window.location.pathname;
const save=()=>{const state={}; document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{state[i]=cb.checked?1:0;}); localStorage.setItem(pageKey, JSON.stringify(state));};
const load=()=>{try{const s=JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(pageKey)||'{}'); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach((cb,i)=>{cb.checked=!!s[i];});}catch(e){}};
const reset=()=>{document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.checked=false); save();};
const textFromLi=(li)=>{const label=li.querySelector('.ingredient-label'); return label?label.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim():li.innerText.replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();};
const copyGroceries=async()=>{const items=[...document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-grocery-list .recipe-ingredient')].filter(li=>!(li.querySelector('.recipe-ingredient-check')||{}).checked).map(textFromLi).filter(Boolean); const txt=items.length?items.map(x=>'- '+x).join('\n'):'(Aucun ingrédient restant)'; const fb=document.getElementById('grocery-copy-feedback'); try{if(navigator.clipboard&&navigator.clipboard.writeText){await navigator.clipboard.writeText(txt);} else {window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt);} if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste copiée.';}catch(e){window.prompt('Copie la liste:', txt); if(fb) fb.textContent='Liste prête à copier.';}};
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',()=>{load(); document.querySelectorAll('.recipe-check').forEach(cb=>cb.addEventListener('change',save)); const c=document.getElementById('copy-grocery-list'); if(c) c.addEventListener('click',copyGroceries); const r=document.getElementById('reset-recipe-checks'); if(r) r.addEventListener('click',reset);});
})();</script>
```
